author: John Tian
name: JEPA Byte-Level Encoder-Decoder + INT6 Optimal-Clip + TTT
blurb: Non-record submission using JEPA (Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture) encoder-decoder as an alternative to standard GPT for the 16MB track. Byte-level tokenizer (vocab 260), patched encoder (5x2 depth-recurrent) with latent predictor, 7-layer causal decoder. INT6 optimal-clip quantization with LZMA compression, STE QAT during warmdown, and test-time training. Final TTT val_bpb: 1.2622.
